allow: PowerShell($py = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python312\\python.exe"; & $py -m venv "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\.venv"; & "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -m pip install --upgrade pip --quiet; Write-Output "venv ready")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING="utf-8"; Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\.venv\\Scripts\\streamlit.exe" -ArgumentList 'run','C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\app.py','--server.headless=true','--server.port=8765' -RedirectStandardOutput "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\_st_out.log" -RedirectStandardError "C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\기환\\_st_err.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/_stcore/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($r.StatusCode\) $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "HEALTH FAILED: $_" })
